docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY JUDGE DESMOND, STAYED UNTIL 22/MAY/98, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF JUN-23-1999, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NON-OPP. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND BOND IS EXONERATED
